answer:
The European cruise market had approximately 155,000 berths at the end of 2011, and an estimated 28,000 new berths are expected between 2012 and 2016. The percent increase is calculated as (28,000 / 155,000) × 100%.  

\[
\frac{28000}{155000} \times 100\% \approx 18.0645\%
\]

\boxed{18.06\%}
